x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR Centers of Excellence (COEs) define the organizational routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment. Without COEs, Now Assist cannot provide department-aware AI routing.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){try{var testGr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_coe");testGr.setLimit(1);testGr.query();if(!testGr.isValid()){return{status:"not_applicable",actualValue:"HR COE table not found",finding:"HR Centers of Excellence table does not exist on this instance."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hr_core_coe");ga.addQuery("active",true);ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var count=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;var actualValue=count+" active HR Centers of Excellence";if(count>=3){return{status:"ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:count+" active HR COEs. Now Assist HRSD can provide department-aware AI case routing based on COE structure."};}else if(count>=1){return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"Only "+count+" active HR COE(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD routing will have limited organizational differentiation."};}else{return{status:"not_ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"No active HR COEs configured. COEs define the routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment."};}}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure HR COEs aligned to your HR organizational structure via sn_hr_core_coe_list.do. Assign HR services to appropriate COEs. Target: 3+ active COEs. Now Assist HRSD uses COE structure for AI-driven case routing recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c86
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[HR Centers of Excellence (COEs) define the organizational routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment. Without COEs, Now Assist cannot provide department-aware AI routing.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>HR COE Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){try{var testGr=new GlideRecord("sn_hr_core_coe");testGr.setLimit(1);testGr.query();if(!testGr.isValid()){return{status:"not_applicable",actualValue:"HR COE table not found",finding:"HR Centers of Excellence table does not exist on this instance."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_hr_core_coe");ga.addQuery("active",true);ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var count=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;var actualValue=count+" active HR Centers of Excellence";if(count>=3){return{status:"ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:count+" active HR COEs. Now Assist HRSD can provide department-aware AI case routing based on COE structure."};}else if(count>=1){return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"Only "+count+" active HR COE(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HRSD routing will have limited organizational differentiation."};}else{return{status:"not_ready",actualValue:actualValue,finding:"No active HR COEs configured. COEs define the routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment."};}}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>HRSD</module> <number>CHK0006029</number> <order>120</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure HR COEs aligned to your HR organizational structure via sn_hr_core_coe_list.do. Assign HR services to appropriate COEs. Target: 3+ active COEs. Now Assist HRSD uses COE structure for AI-driven case routing recommendations.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c86</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
